seoTitle: Mullengudgery vs Mullion — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mullengudgery and Mullion. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mullengudgery and Mullion.
heading: Mullengudgery vs Mullion — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mullengudgery, New South Wales and Mullion, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mullengudgery has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mullion (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mullengudgery or Mullion safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mullengudgery has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Mullion scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mullengudgery scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Mullion scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mullengudgery or Mullion?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mullengudgery has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
